title: Senior Radiologist at Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group:
Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
